name: auto
description: Toolchain-agnostic pulsed loop engine for Claude Code: runs the auto loop pattern (plan-loop -> handoff -> work-loop, parallel fan-out, severity-based exit) as a durable, observable state machine. Ships named workflows (A1 Classic, A2 Parallel Theories+Judge, A4 Adversarial Pair, W Work-only, Pipeline, Review) — pick a workflow topology at /auto start, or author your own. A disk-persisted per-step run-record is the loop's source of truth; the engine is workflow-blind and drives any toolchain through a thin backend. Self-paces in-session via ScheduleWakeup; resume after a suspend is one command off the durable run-record.
